title: Traffic Accident Sugar Bottom Road and Pebble Hill Road. (Update)
Traffic Accident Sugar Bottom Road and Pebble Hill Road.
summary: Please be advised of a traffic accident in the area of Sugar Bottom Road between Pebble Hill Road and Foy Drive. Please use alternate routes.

title: found dog on May 2, 2026
summary: The pictured dog was found near the creek off of E Park Ave and N Main Street in Sellersville on 5/2/26 at 7am.  As no owner could be located, the dog was taken to Quakertown SPCA.
